sections.paragraph:
ἀντασπάζομαι 1 aor. ἀντησπασάμην (s. ἀσπάζομαι; X.; Plut., Tim. 254 [38, 6]; s. ZPE 7, ’71, 164a) greet in return τινά someone Hv 4, 2, 2; 5:1.

aor. aor. = aorist

  1. X. = Xenophon, V–IV b.c.—List 5

Plut Plut , I–II a.d.—List 5

ZPE ZPE = Zeitschrift für Papyrologie und Epigraphik—Lists 3, 4, 6

Hv Hv = Visions

Arndt, William ; Danker, Frederick W. ; Bauer, Walter: A Greek-English Lexicon of the New Testament and Other Early Christian Literature. 3rd ed. Chicago : University of Chicago Press, 2000, S. 87
